_publications._publicationTitle: Using antisense oligonucleotides for the physiological modulation of the alternative splicing of NF1 exon 23a during PC12 neuronal differentiation.

_contextSnippet: Representative images of a double immunofluorescent staining of NGFR (red) and α-tubulin (green) of PC12 cells after 72 h at different experimental conditions
details: Successfully used for double immunofluorescent staining of PC12 cells at 1:100 dilution to identify nerve growth factor receptor expression
